case_title: ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. VS TRADITIONAL PAINTING AND DECORATING LTD.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TRADITIONAL PAINTING AND DECORATING LTD.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,825.80 FILED BY ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT TRADITIONAL PAINTING AND DECORATING LTD. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCESS SCAFFOLDING CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TRADITIONAL PAINTING AND DECORATING LTD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
